caption: A man wearing a red patterned cap and a dark shirt with red floral designs speaks directly to the camera in an indoor setting. Behind him, a small inset window shows two men seated in a living room with red curtains and gold-trimmed furniture; both men in the inset are wearing white traditional attire and red caps. The scene remains consistent across the sequence, with only slight changes in the speaker's facial expression as he talks. On-screen graphics include the "plustv" logo in the upper corners and a purple banner that reads "PLUS POLITICS." Below this, a large white text overlay states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen features a white bar with "FOLLOW US" and social media icons next to "PLUSTVAFRICA" in some frames, while other frames display "WATCH ON" followed by "DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308" logos.
